'''jochangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jabbersome|jabbersome]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jabbersome|jabbersome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jochangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || jochangithi || jochangiji || jochangishi || jochangiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || jochanguthu || jochanguju || jochangushu || jochanguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || jochanguthu || jochanguju || jochangushu || jochanguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || jochangufthuf || jochangufjuf || jochangufshuf || jochangufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || jochangethe || jochangeje || jochangeshe || jochangeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || jochangotho || jochangojo || jochangosho || jochangoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || jochangotho || jochangojo || jochangosho || jochangoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || jochangofthof || jochangofjof || jochangofshof || jochangofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jochangïfthïf || jochangïfjïf || jochangïfshïf || jochangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jochangïfthïf || jochangïfjïf || jochangïfshïf || jochangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jochangïfthïf || jochangïfjïf || jochangïfshïf || jochangïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jochangïfthïf || jochangïfjïf || jochangïfshïf || jochangïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || jochangæthæ || jochangæjæ || jochangæshæ || jochangækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || jochangatha || jochangaja || jochangasha || jochangaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || jochangatha || jochangaja || jochangasha || jochangaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || jochangafthaf || jochangafjaf || jochangafshaf || jochangafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || jochangasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || jochangshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || jochangroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || jochangmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || jochangyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gojochangnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gojochangnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gojochangnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gojochangnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || jochachangasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || jochachangshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || jochachangroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || jochachangmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || jochachangyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gojochachangnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gojochachangnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gojochachangnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gojochachangnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || jechængasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || jechængshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || jechængroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || jechængmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || jechængyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gojechængnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gojechængnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gojechængnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gojechængnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || jochfangasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || jochfangshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || jochfangroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || jochfangmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || jochfangyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gojochfangnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gojochfangnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gojochfangnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gojochfangnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
